nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 45. East northeast wind around 7 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Slight Chance Rain Showers
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 4pm and 5pm. Partly sunny. High near 73, with temperatures falling to around 71 in the afternoon. East southeast wind 7 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 10pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 52. East northeast wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 72. East wind 9 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday Night
